stemHtml: When configuring an aircraft for emergency fuel jettisoning, which of the following is correct?

options.a: Flaps and/or slats must never be extended during fuel jettisoning.
options.b: Flaps and/or slats may be extended, provided they do not interfere with the fuel jettisoning.
options.c: Full flaps/slats should be used to increase the jettison efficiency.
options.d: The landing gear should be extended during fuel jettisoning to provide extra stability.
